hero.subtitle: LM Essentials brings the finest products to market — technology, nutrition, beauty and more — delivered to every corner of the world where possible.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: A company built to export without limits
about.p1: At LM Essentials we believe the best products should have no borders. We specialize in exporting essential categories for modern life, with the highest quality standards and reliable logistics.
about.p2: We work directly with selected manufacturers and distributors to ensure every product we export meets the most rigorous international standards.
about.quote: "Our mission is to be the trusted bridge between the world's finest products and the markets that need them."

delivery.desc: Your products arrive on time and in perfect condition. We follow up to ensure your full satisfaction.

markets.subtitle: Our international distribution network allows us to reach the major markets of the Americas, Europe, Asia and beyond. If your country permits it, LM Essentials can get there.

q1.q: What countries do you export to?
q1.a: We export to over 50 countries worldwide wherever import regulations permit. Contact us with your country and we'll confirm availability immediately.

q2.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
q2.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product category. We work with both small distributors and large importers — contact us for a customized quote.

q3.q: How long does international shipping take?
q3.a: Shipping times vary by destination and method. Typically 5-15 business days for air freight and 20-45 days for sea freight. We provide tracking for all shipments.

q4.q: Do you handle customs and documentation?
q4.a: Yes. We handle all export documentation including commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin and customs declarations for your destination country.

q5.q: What payment methods do you accept?
q5.a: We accept international wire transfers (SWIFT), letters of credit and other secure international payment methods. Payment terms are discussed during the quoting process.

q6.q: Can I request samples before placing a full order?
q6.a: Yes, we offer samples for most product categories. Sample costs and shipping are discussed on a case-by-case basis. Contact us to arrange.

contact.title: Ready to export with us?
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we'll provide a personalized quote. We work with importers, distributors and businesses from all over the world.
